# Rajiv Ramkrishnan - Personal Website

> IT Service Management leader, technology consultant, and builder based in Ottawa, Ontario, Canada.

Rajiv Ramkrishnan is an IT professional with 20+ years of experience across IT Service Management, operations, governance, compliance, and cross-functional team leadership in financial services, healthcare, and telecommunications. He is the founder of SVAHSV Inc., a consultancy serving small business owners and solopreneurs.

## Professional Background

- ITIL Expert certified with deep hands-on experience in ITSM, IT governance, and compliance
- Experience at HSBC, BMO, LifeLabs, EXL Service, and Rogers Communications
- Expertise in BMC Helix, ServiceNow, ITIL, Lean Six Sigma, PRINCE2, and Agile
- Manages teams, budgets, and IT operations at enterprise scale
- Open to full-time, part-time, and contract roles in IT Service Management and IT Management

## SVAHSV Inc.

SVAHSV Inc. is Rajiv's consultancy providing:
- IT consulting and technology advisory for small businesses and solopreneurs
- App development (iOS: Zentines, Web: Digital Presence Audit tool)
- Digital presence and funnel building services

Website: https://svahsv.online

## Values and Approach

- Applies AI tools deliberately with human judgment always in the loop
- Uses value stream mapping to identify waste before recommending changes
- Believes in integrity, accountability, resourcefulness, and reliability
- Serves clients with undivided attention and genuine commitment
- Based in Ottawa, Canada. Open to remote work globally.

## Contact

Contact Rajiv through the form at https://rajivramkrishnan.com or via LinkedIn at https://linkedin.com/in/rajivramkrishnan
